one_thing: Introduce a robust --retry flag with exponential backoff (and jitter) for all network subcommands (install, fetch, update), reducing transient failure rates observed in CI and on flaky connections.
justification: Directly addresses user feedback in issues #231 and ops notes, plus 1.4.2 telemetry showing a 12% first-attempt network error rate.
risks: Potential increased total runtime on persistent network outages
Need to clearly communicate defaults and opt-out
test_plan: Integration tests simulate ECONNRESET and timeouts; verify eventual success within 3 attempts
CI job runs with injected packet loss to confirm stability gains
